entities.name: UNDERNOURISHMENT
entities.description: The state of not having enough food to maintain a healthy life, affecting nearly one billion people)

entities.name: FOOD DEMAND
entities.description: The requirement for food to sustain the global population, expected to double by 2050)

entities.name: BIOFUEL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of fuels from biological sources, creating competition for land and water resources)

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A world region primarily in developing countries characterized by rainfed agriculture and smallholder farms)

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Countries where the Semi-Arid Tropics are primarily located)

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural systems that rely solely on rainfall for water)

entities.name: CLIMATIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: High variability in climate over time and space that hinders agricultural production)

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: Lack of financial resources that prevents areas from reaching potential agricultural production)

entities.name: POOR EDUCATION
entities.description: Lack of educational resources that prevents areas from reaching potential agricultural production)

entities.name: POOR POLICY AND INSTITUTIONAL SUPPORT
entities.description: Lack of government and institutional backing that prevents areas from reaching potential agricultural production)

entities.name: POLITICAL INSTABILITY
entities.description: Unstable political environments that prevent areas from reaching potential agricultural production)

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total output of agricultural activities in a given region)

entities.name: AEZ METHODOLOGY
entities.description: IIASA’s Agro-Ecological Zones methodology used to assess agricultural potential and model impacts)

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural product produced per unit area)

entities.name: HIGH INPUTS
entities.description: The application of significant resources to maximize agricultural output)

entities.name: ADVANCED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Sophisticated farming practices used to improve agricultural yields)

entities.name: WATER MANAGEMENT TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to control and optimize water use in agriculture)

entities.name: RAINWATER HARVESTING
entities.description: A water management technique used to collect and store rainwater to improve yields)

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A water management technique used to maintain optimal soil moisture to improve yields)

entities.name: BIO-PHYSICAL CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Natural limitations that restrict agricultural productivity)

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agricultural yields)

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Agricultural plants whose yields vary based on region and climate change impacts)
